snapshot.title: Write missing briefingExpression dialogue for all 4 character arcs
snapshot.description: Each chapter needs a briefingExpression — the short in-character voice line that plays when a chapter is selected. Missing entries show a blank/fallback. Go through each character (all 4 arcs) and write 1–2 sentence briefing lines for every chapter missing one. Tone should match each character's voice. ~2h.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Every chapter has a non-empty briefingExpression
Lines are in the character's established voice
No placeholder/fallback text visible in UI
